candidates.name: Cold Email Sequence Step Visualizer
candidates.pitch: Detect outreach emails in Gmail, parse sequence step indicators, render a compact sequence tracker in the Gmail sidebar. Sync with popular sequencing tools via API. Improves existing tools rather than
candidates.pain: Sales reps using tools like Apollo or Lemlist lose track of where a prospect is in a multi-step sequence, leading to awkward duplicate outreach.

candidates.name: Webhook Payload Schema Tester
candidates.pitch: Capture webhook requests via extension, compare against JSON Schema or OpenAPI spec, highlight field mismatches and type errors. DevTools panel with diff view. Stripe, Twilio, GitHub webhook developer
candidates.pain: QA teams waste hours manually testing webhook payloads against expected schemas because no tooling exists to validate live or recorded requests.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GitHub Issue Sentiment Arc Tracker
candidates.pitch: Track sentiment across comments in a GitHub issue using a lightweight sentiment API, render trend line in the issue sidebar. Helps leads spot problematic threads early. Novel angle on GitHub analytics
candidates.pain: Engineering managers track issue velocity but miss emotional patterns—issues that escalate in frustration get reopened or cause burnout.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: API Rate Limit Reset Countdown
candidates.pitch: Extension intercepts 429 responses, extracts Retry-After header, shows live countdown badge and notification. Configurable allowlist of APIs to monitor. Dev productivity tool with clear value prop.
candidates.pain: Developers polling rate-limited APIs get 429 errors and must manually calculate reset times from response headers, breaking flow.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: IndexedDB Data Export Bridge
candidates.pitch: Intercept IndexedDB writes for configurable domains, expose export UI (JSON, CSV), optional cloud sync to S3/GCS. Useful for web app testing and data portability. Target QA teams and power users.
candidates.pain: Web apps store critical data in IndexedDB but provide no export—losing data when clearing browser or switching machines is common and painful.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Gong Call Key Quote Clipper
candidates.pitch: In Gong call player, detect speaker segments, allow one-click quote clipping with context, auto-format for Slack/LinkedIn, save to shared team library. Adds workflow speed on top of Gong's existing fe
candidates.pain: Sales teams surface great call moments but lose them in recordings—clipping and sharing key quotes to Slack or CRM is manual and slow.
